overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing Arthur Morgan walking through a rural Western town on a sunny day. The character travels down a dirt road past wooden fences, a large white house, and encounters horses and wagons before approaching a ranch entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt road approaching large plantation house

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt road toward the large white house in the distance

entered.detail: two-story white wooden house with wraparound porch and green roof
wooden split-rail fence running alongside the road
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires
reddish-brown dirt road with wagon wheel ruts

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a sunlit dirt road flanked by wooden fences and utility poles, approaching a large white two-story house with a wraparound porch in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching town center with house on left

events.description: horse rider passes by on the right side traveling away from camera
passing a stationary wooden wagon on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the road as a horse rider passes by on the right and approaching a parked wagon

entered.detail: stationary wooden wagon with large wheels parked beside the fence

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as a horse rider passes by on the right heading away, and approaches a wooden wagon parked on the left side near the large house.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing the large house with ranch entrance ahead

events.description: passing the large white house on the left side of the road
horse-drawn wagon with barrel passes by on the right traveling same direction

agents.ego_description: walking past the house and alongside a moving wagon carrying a large barrel

entered.detail: massive oak tree with spreading branches ahead on the road
white wooden picket fence surrounding the house property
wooden ranch entrance archway with horizontal sign beam

segments.scene_description: The character passes the large white house and a parked wagon, then walks alongside a large oak tree as a horse-drawn barrel wagon passes by on the right, with a wooden ranch archway visible ahead.

events.description: passing under the wooden ranch archway into the ranch area

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing under the ranch entrance archway into the compound

entered.detail: cluster of wooden ranch buildings and stables on the left side
wooden stable structure with horses visible near the fence

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the dirt road toward a wooden ranch archway, passing under it as various ranch buildings and stables come into view on both sides, entering the ranch compound.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit rural road that leads from an open residential path into the heart of a bustling ranch compound. It begins with the character walking down a dirt road flanked by wooden fences and utility poles, moving steadily toward a large white two-story house with a wraparound porch. As the character advances, a horse rider passes by on the right and a wooden wagon appears on the left, marking the transition toward the estate. The scene then shifts past the large house and a towering oak tree as a horse-drawn barrel wagon crosses the path, bringing a wooden ranch archway into clear view. Finally, the camera follows the character under the archway, where the open road gives way to a dense arrangement of ranch buildings and stables.
